items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding IDOR on booking IDs.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference) on booking IDs, but the evidence provided does not include any specific tests or outcomes related to this scenario. While the linked use case outlines a booking process, it does not address the security aspect of IDOR, nor does it provide any results from testing this vulnerability. Therefore, the lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this scenario.
